settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage your account and system configuration.

profile.title: Account Profile
profile.help: Contact your system administrator to update profile information.

security.title: Change Password
security.infoOne: Passwords are hashed with bcrypt (cost factor 12) and never stored in plaintext.
security.infoTwo: Sessions use JWT tokens — valid for 30 days. Signing out invalidates the session.
security.infoThree: All admin routes require authentication. Unauthorized access attempts are rejected at the edge.

team.title: Team Members
team.help: To add new team members, use the seed script or MongoDB Compass to insert a new user document with a bcrypt-hashed password.

localization.title: Localization Runtime
localization.description: Control active locales, default language, and translation coverage visibility.

experience.title: Public Experience Template
experience.description: Choose between the restrained classic presentation and the premium animated presentation.

system.envHelp: Business configuration is managed via environment variables in .env.local.
